topic: Lionel Messi's record sixth World Cup — the last dance
subject: lionel-messi

hook.spoken_hook: Lionel Messi is about to play in a record sixth World Cup.

scenes.voiceover: Lionel Messi is about to play in a sixth World Cup — something only three men in history will ever have done.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16 title card, black bg, huge gold-gradient '6'

scenes.voiceover: He's thirty-eight, turning thirty-nine during the tournament. And he is still Argentina's talisman.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16 stat card, black bg, gold accents

scenes.voiceover: And he's not here to wave goodbye. He's leading the defending champions, chasing it all over again.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16 card, black bg, gold text
scenes.visual_query: argentina football fans flags celebration crowd

scenes.voiceover: And by his own words, this is almost certainly the last time we will ever see him at a World Cup.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16 card, black bg, gold text 'ONE LAST DANCE'

scenes.voiceover: Thirty-nine years old, chasing one final, impossible trophy. So tell me this.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16 card, black bg, gold World Cup trophy silhouette

comment_bait: Messi at 39 — does he lift it one last time? Yes or no 👇
cta: Follow @tikitakafootytv for every World Cup story.
music_mood: emotional, building strings, swell on the final line

thumbnail.concept: black bg, giant gold '6', no face

youtube_title: Lionel Messi Is About to Do Something No Player in History Ever Has
youtube_description: A record sixth World Cup, at 38 turning 39, leading the defending champions — almost certainly Messi's last. Does he win it one final time? #TikiTakaFootyTV
instagram_caption: A SIXTH World Cup. Nobody has ever done it. 🐐 Does Messi lift it one last time at 39? Yes or no 👇 Follow @tikitakafootytv
